.dockerignore.general_idea: Add standard IntelliJ IDEA artifact patterns to .dockerignore to prevent IDE metadata from entering the Docker context.
Add OS-specific temporary files to .dockerignore to keep the build context clean.
Exclude Docker configuration files from the build context to avoid conflicts or unnecessary inclusion.
Exclude Git metadata directories and ignore files from the Docker build context.

.gitignore.general_idea: Replace a sparse, project-specific .gitignore with a comprehensive, standard Java ecosystem ignore list covering IDEs, build tools, and OS artifacts.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced old entries with standard blocks for IntelliJ, Eclipse, NetBeans, VS Code, Maven, and OS-specific files.

README.md.general_idea: Update the project website URL in the README to reflect a new domain or path structure.

rules.xml.general_idea: Update the XSD schema location URL in rules.xml to point to the new MoJohaus domain.

src/site/site.xml.general_idea: Remove the MIT license header comment block from the Maven site descriptor.
